sentence: Let the loreraining land before deciding the lesson is quiché.

wombos.definition: Lore pouring down on you whether you asked for it or not — the meteorological form of being loreained.
wombos.example: Stepped into the group chat and it started loreraining immediately.

wombos.definition: So quirky and niche that it's become overdone — quiche behavior that has crossed into cliché territory. When your niche becomes the new normal, you've gone quiché.
